# Process Update Checklist

Use this checklist when proposing changes to process documentation in docs/.

- [ ] Add or update content in the relevant docs/ file.
- [ ] Reference the originating issue number in the PR description.
- [ ] Add stakeholders and reviewers for the change.
- [ ] Confirm acceptance criteria and update risk register if applicable.
- [ ] Include examples or scenarios demonstrating the change.
- [ ] Update CHANGELOG or document date/version.
- [ ] Notify the team via the weekly sync or stakeholder channel.

Example usage: add a Roles & Personas entry and include this checklist in the PR body.
